title: CDS View with OData draft enablement for transactional UIs
description: CDS View with OData draft enablement for transactional UIs. Key topics: @OData.draft.enabled: true enables draft handling for the entity. Draft allows users to save incomplete changes before publishing. Requirements for draft-enabled CDS views:.

sections.title: Key Learning Points
sections.description:
◆@OData.draft.enabled: true enables draft handling for the entity
◆Draft allows users to save incomplete changes before publishing
◆Requirements for draft-enabled CDS views:
◆Draft views work with RAP (ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model)
◆The draft key fields (DraftUUID, DraftAdministrativeData) are
◆Draft views CANNOT be consumed without RAP BO behavior definition

sections.title: CDS Source Code

content:
Key Learning Points

◆@OData.draft.enabled: true enables draft handling for the entity
◆Draft allows users to save incomplete changes before publishing
◆Requirements for draft-enabled CDS views:
◆Draft views work with RAP (ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model)
◆The draft key fields (DraftUUID, DraftAdministrativeData) are
◆Draft views CANNOT be consumed without RAP BO behavior definition

CDS Source Code

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZPRAC_SQL_ODRAF'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK
@EndUserText.label: 'Practice CDS - OData Draft enabled (RAP transactional)'
@VDM.viewType: #BASIC
@ObjectModel.compositionRoot: true
@ObjectModel.writeDraft: true
@ObjectModel.createEnabled: true
@ObjectModel.updateEnabled: true
@ObjectModel.deleteEnabled: true
@OData.draft.enabled: true
@OData.publish: true
@OData.entitySet.name: 'TravelDraft'
define view ZPRAC_CDS_ODATA_DRAFT
  as select from /dmo/travel
{
  @Environment.systemField: #CLIENT
  key client            as Client,
  key travel_id         as TravelId,
      agency_id         as AgencyId,
      customer_id       as CustomerId,
      @Semantics.date: true
      begin_date        as BeginDate,
      @Semantics.date: true
      end_date          as EndDate,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
      booking_fee       as BookingFee,
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
      total_price       as TotalPrice,
      currency_code     as CurrencyCode,
      description       as Description,
      status            as Status
}
details:
✓ @ObjectModel.writeDraft: true (or @ObjectModel.writeDraft

pointing to a separate draft-enabled view)

✓ @OData.draft.enabled: true

✓ @ObjectModel.compositionRoot: true

✓ @ObjectModel.createEnabled, .updateEnabled, .deleteEnabled: true

automatically added by the framework

— this annotation is the STARTING point

DRAFT LIFECYCLE:

Create Draft → Save Draft → Activate → Delete Draft

The framework manages IsActiveEntity, DraftUUID, etc. automatically.

NOTE:

This view demonstrates the annotations only. A full draft scenario

also requires RAP behavior definition (BDEF), service definition,

and service binding — beyond the scope of this CDS reference.
topic: @OData.draft — transactional Fiori UIs with draft handling
